task.title: Analyze openclaw package split between agent-relay and relaycast

events.content: Use existing ../relaycast package as source of truth and migrate only config/shared primitives from @agent-relay/openclaw: Use existing ../relaycast package as source of truth and migrate only config/shared primitives from @agent-relay/openclaw

raw.chosen: Use existing ../relaycast package as source of truth and migrate only config/shared primitives from @agent-relay/openclaw
raw.reasoning: User-defined boundary keeps orchestration in @agent-relay/openclaw while avoiding duplicate OpenClaw detection/.env logic
